reviews.comment:
De los mejores ACA de zona norte, completo. Tiene atencion administrativa, mecánica ligera y electricidad, cambios de aceite, y lavado. Buen comedor y quiosco, junto a otro de articulos del automotor bastante completo.

(Translated by Google)
One of the best ACA branches in the northern suburbs, fully equipped. It offers administrative services, light mechanical and electrical work, oil changes, and car washes. There's a good cafeteria and kiosk, along with another, quite well-stocked automotive supply store.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdWFmcHNBRRAB
